节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: The xml module provides utilities for converting XML text to Javascript object, XML generation and parsing.
The XmlDynamicSerializer interface is used to dynamically generate an xml file.
A parameterized constructor used to create a new XmlDynamicSerializer instance. The input parameter is an encoding format of string type.
注释信息: @param { string } [encoding] - [encoding='utf8']  this is its encoding, only support utf-8.
@throws { BusinessError } 10200066 - Incorrect encoding format, only support utf-8.

parameters.说明: string } [encoding] - [encoding='utf8']  this is its encoding, only support utf-8.

error_codes.description: Incorrect encoding format, only support utf-8.

节点.功能描述: Write an attribute to xml element.
注释信息: @param { string } name - Key name of the attribute. Cannot be an empty string.
@throws { BusinessError } 10200062 - The cumulative length of xml has exceeded the upper limit 100000.
@throws { BusinessError } 10200064 - Cannot be an empty string.

parameters.说明: Key name of the attribute. Cannot be an empty string.

error_codes.description: The cumulative length of xml has exceeded the upper limit 100000.
Illegal position for xml.
Cannot be an empty string.

注释信息: @param { string } name - Name of the element.
@throws { BusinessError } 10200062 - The cumulative length of xml has exceeded the upper limit 100000.
@throws { BusinessError } 10200064 - Cannot be an empty string.

error_codes.description: The cumulative length of xml has exceeded the upper limit 100000.
Cannot be an empty string.

节点.功能描述: Writes xml declaration with encoding. For example: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>.
注释信息: @throws { BusinessError } 10200062 - The cumulative length of xml has exceeded the upper limit 100000.

error_codes.description: The cumulative length of xml has exceeded the upper limit 100000.
Illegal position for xml.

节点.功能描述: Writes a element start tag with the given name.
注释信息: @param { string } name - Name of the element.
@throws { BusinessError } 10200062 - The cumulative length of xml has exceeded the upper limit 100000.
@throws { BusinessError } 10200064 - Cannot be an empty string.

error_codes.description: The cumulative length of xml has exceeded the upper limit 100000.
Cannot be an empty string.

节点.功能描述: Writes end tag of the element.
注释信息: @throws { BusinessError } 10200062 - The cumulative length of xml has exceeded the upper limit 100000.
@throws { BusinessError } 10200065 - There is no match between the startElement and the endElement.

error_codes.description: The cumulative length of xml has exceeded the upper limit 100000.
There is no match between the startElement and the endElement.

节点.功能描述: Writes the namespace of the current element tag.
注释信息: @param { string } prefix - Values name of the prefix. Cannot be an empty string.
@param { string } namespace - Values of namespace. Cannot be an empty string.
@throws { BusinessError } 10200062 - The cumulative length of xml has exceeded the upper limit 100000.
@throws { BusinessError } 10200064 - Cannot be an empty string.

error_codes.description: The cumulative length of xml has exceeded the upper limit 100000.
Cannot be an empty string.

@throws { BusinessError } 10200064 - Cannot be an empty string.

节点.功能描述: Get an ArrayBuffer from a XmlDynamicSerializer instance.
注释信息: @returns { ArrayBuffer } - Returns ArrayBuffer result from a XmlDynamicSerializer instance.
